edit.title: Edit OAuth Client
edit.labelConnectOnlyHelp: If enabled, this provider will not create new customer accounts. It can only be used to connect an existing account.
edit.labelTrustEmailHelp: If enabled, a key-based login only succeeds when the provider's email also matches the linked customer account. This prevents access if the OAuth key is reused by a different person with a different email address. Also useful when the shop owner needs to retain control over which email addresses are used, ensuring customers cannot bypass email policies through OAuth login.
edit.labelUpdateEmailOnLogin: Update email address on every login
edit.labelUpdateEmailOnLoginHelp: If enabled, the customer's email address in Shopware is updated to match the email returned by the provider on each login. Useful when the provider (e.g. corporate SSO) is the authoritative source for email addresses.
edit.labelDisablePasswordLoginHelp: If enabled, customers who have linked their account with this provider will no longer be able to log in using their email address and password. They must use this OAuth provider to sign in.
edit.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete this OAuth client? This action cannot be undone.

connections.title: OAuth Connections
connections.deleteConfirmText: Are you sure you want to disconnect this OAuth provider from the customer account?

customerDetail.disconnectConfirmText: Are you sure you want to disconnect this OAuth provider from the customer account?
